name: MAX2870
description: 23.5MHz to 6000MHz Fractional/Integer-N Synthesizer/VCO with integrated VCOs, dual differential RF outputs, 4-wire SPI, 32-pin TQFN

key_performance.output_power_range: −4dBm to +5dBm (3dB steps), each output independently programmable
key_performance.outputs: Dual differential open-collector (RFOUTA±, RFOUTB±); RFOUTB can be set to VCO fundamental via BDIV bit
key_performance.supply_current_max: 180mA (both channels, max output power, both divide-by-2)
key_performance.interface: 4-wire SPI: CLK, DATA, LE (write); MUX_OUT (readback of Register 6)

pins.name: CLK
pins.description: Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI master clock. Min CLK period 50ns (20MHz max). Meets 1.8V logic thresholds. tDS=25ns setup, tDH=25ns hold on DATA.

pins.name: DATA
pins.description: Serial Data Input. Data loaded MSB first. The 3 LSBs identify the register address.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI master MOSI. Data must be stable tDS=25ns before and tDH=25ns after rising CLK edge.

pins.name: LE
pins.description: Load Enable Input. Rising edge of LE latches the shift register contents into the selected register.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI CS (active-high latch). tLES=20ns setup before rising edge, tLEH=10ns hold after. Minimum pulse-width high tLEW=20ns.

pins.name: CE
pins.description: Chip Enable. Logic-low powers down the device; charge pump becomes high impedance. In low-power mode all blocks except SPI are off.
pins.requirements: Tie high (3.0–3.6V or VCC_DIG) for normal operation. Drive low to enter shutdown. After CE returns high, wait ≥20ms before programming registers.

pins.name: SW
pins.description: Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to loop filter when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal mode.
pins.requirements: Leave unconnected (NC) in normal operation. For fast-lock: connect to the mid-point of the split loop-filter resistor (R2A/R2B). Set CDM=01 in Register 3.

pins.name: VCC_CP
pins.description: Power Supply for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Star routing from central VCC node recommended. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps as close as possible to pin. One via per cap to ground plane.

pins.name: CP_OUT
pins.description: Charge-Pump Output. Current-output node that drives the external loop filter.
pins.requirements: Connect to the input of the loop filter network (C3 to GND, then R3, then R2A node which connects to TUNE). Keep trace short. CP can be three-stated by TRI bit (Reg2 bit4).

pins.name: GND_CP
pins.description: Ground for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: GND_PLL
pins.description: Ground for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: VCC_PLL
pins.description: Power Supply for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Datasheet recommends three separate LDOs for VCC_RF, VCC_DIG, and VCC_PLL for best performance. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: GND_RF
pins.description: Ground for RF Outputs.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: RFOUTA_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Differential positive output. Fundamental VCO ÷ DIVA.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke from VCC_RF for single-ended use, or via RF choke/50Ω to supply for differential. Enable via RFA_EN bit (Reg4 bit5) and RFOUT_EN pin. If unused: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω termination to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTA_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Differential negative output.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke from VCC_RF. If unused: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω termination to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output B. Differential positive output. BDIV=0: same frequency as RFOUTA; BDIV=1: VCO fundamental frequency.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke from VCC_RF. Enable via RFB_EN bit (Reg4 bit8). If unused: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω termination to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Differential negative output.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke from VCC_RF. If unused: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω termination to GND.

pins.name: VCC_RF
pins.description: Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers. Also serves as DC bias supply for open-collector RF outputs via 27nH chokes.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Separate LDO recommended for best RF output performance. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin. The 27nH RF chokes on each output pin connect back to this supply.

pins.name: VCC_VCO
pins.description: VCO Power Supply.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Decoupling capacitors must connect to the analog ground plane (not digital ground plane) for best phase noise. Use 100nF + 1µF.

pins.name: GND_VCO
pins.description: Ground for VCO.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: NOISE_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias node that must be externally decoupled.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin directly to GND. Keep trace as short as possible. Do NOT omit — leaving floating degrades VCO phase noise significantly.

pins.name: TUNE
pins.description: VCO Control Voltage Input. Driven by the output of the external PLL loop filter. Compliance range: 0.5V to 2.5V.
pins.requirements: Connect to the output node of the loop filter network (not directly to CP_OUT). The 3-bit internal TUNE ADC monitors this voltage for VCO autoselect; valid range 0.5–2.5V for in-lock status.

pins.name: GND_TUNE
pins.description: Ground for VCO Control Input.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: RSET
pins.description: Charge-Pump Current Range Input. External resistor to GND sets the minimum CP current: ICP = 1.63V/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
pins.requirements: Connect a resistor between 2.7kΩ and 10kΩ from this pin to GND. Typical: 5.1kΩ → ICP_min=0.32mA (CP=0000), ICP_max=5.12mA (CP=1111). Do NOT leave floating or tie to GND.

pins.name: BIAS_FILT
pins.description: VCO Bias Decoupling. Internal VCO bias filter node.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin directly to GND. Keep trace as short as possible. Do NOT omit.

pins.name: REG
pins.description: Reference Voltage Compensation. Internal bandgap/reference decoupling node.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin directly to GND. Keep trace as short as possible. Do NOT omit.

pins.name: LD
pins.description: Lock Detect Output. Behaviour set by LD[1:0] bits (Reg5 bits 23:22): 01=digital lock detect, 10=analog lock detect (open-drain), 00=always low, 11=always high.
pins.requirements: For digital lock detect (LD=01): connect to MCU GPIO. VOH = VCC−0.4V at 0.3mA source, VOL = 0.4V at 0.3mA sink. For analog lock detect (LD=10): output is open-drain, add 10kΩ pull-up to VCC.

pins.name: RFOUT_EN
pins.description: RF Output Enable (hardware). Logic-low disables both RFOUTA and RFOUTB regardless of register settings.
pins.requirements: Pull high for normal RF output operation. Can be driven low by MCU to mute both outputs. Per-output software control via RFA_EN (Reg4 bit5) and RFB_EN (Reg4 bit8). Keep low during the register init sequence, then pull high after second programming pass.

pins.name: GND_DIG
pins.description: Ground for Digital Circuitry.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: VCC_DIG
pins.description: Power Supply for Digital Circuitry. Also provides the internal bias level VCC_DIG/2 for the REF_IN input.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: REF_IN
pins.description: Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter with internal bias at VCC_DIG/2. Input range 10–200MHz (or 10–100MHz with reference doubler DBR=1). In shutdown, input is high-impedance.
pins.requirements: Must be AC-coupled (internal bias at VCC_DIG/2 will be disturbed by DC coupling). Input sensitivity: 0.7×VCC_DIG Vpp minimum. Input capacitance 2pF. Input current ±60µA.

pins.name: MUX_OUT
pins.description: Multiplexed Output / Serial Data Out. Function selected by MUX[3:0] (Reg2 bits 28:26 + Reg5 bit18 MSB). Options: high-Z, D_VDD, D_GND, R-divider output, N-divider/2, analog lock detect, digital lock detect, or Register-6 readback (MUX=1100).
pins.requirements: Connect to MCU GPIO for lock detect or status monitoring. For Reg6 readback: set MUX=1100, then issue SPI read sequence per datasheet Figure 2. VOH=VCC−0.4V at 0.3mA, VOL=0.4V at 0.3mA. tMS=10ns setup, tMH=10ns hold.

pins.name: GND_SD
pins.description: Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP). Route each GND_ pin separately to the ground plane.

pins.name: VCC_SD
pins.description: Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: EP
pins.description: Exposed Pad. Thermal and ground pad on the bottom of the package. Must be soldered to PCB ground plane for proper electrical and thermal performance.
pins.requirements: Solder to PCB ground plane using multiple vias (minimum 9 vias in 3×3 pattern recommended). The seven separate GND_ signal pins must each connect to the board ground plane independently — do NOT route GND_ pins directly to EP; the ground plane ties them together.

required_passives.placement: Each VCC pin (VCC_CP p6, VCC_PLL p10, VCC_RF p16, VCC_VCO p17, VCC_DIG p28, VCC_SD p32) to adjacent GND
required_passives.reason: High-frequency supply decoupling — one per VCC pin, placed as close as possible. One dedicated via per cap to ground plane.

required_passives.placement: Each VCC pin (VCC_CP, VCC_PLL, VCC_RF, VCC_VCO, VCC_DIG, VCC_SD) to GND
required_passives.reason: Bulk supply decoupling. Star routing from central VCC node recommended to minimise coupling between IC sections.
VCO noise decoupling — mandatory. Omitting this cap degrades VCO phase noise significantly.
VCO bias filter — mandatory. Keep trace short.
REF_IN has an internal bias at VCC_DIG/2. Must be AC-coupled to the external reference source.
Sets minimum CP current: ICP_min = 1.63V/RSET. 5.1kΩ → 0.32mA min / 5.12mA max. Do not omit.

required_passives.placement: VCC_RF (pin 16) to each of RFOUTA_P (12), RFOUTA_N (13), RFOUTB_P (14), RFOUTB_N (15) — one choke per output pin
required_passives.reason: Open-collector RF output bias. Provides DC path to supply while blocking RF. Measured with 27nH to VCC_RF into 50Ω load per datasheet Note 4.

required_passives.placement: Each active RF output pin to GND (load); each unused RF output to GND (termination)
required_passives.reason: RF output load/termination. Unused outputs must still be terminated: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

required_passives.value: Loop filter: C3=820pF, R3=250Ω, C1=0.012µF, R2=120Ω, C2=0.1µF (40kHz BW at fPFD=25MHz)
required_passives.placement: CP_OUT (pin 7) → C3 to GND, then R3, then junction → R2 → C2 to GND; junction also → TUNE (pin 20). C1 in parallel with R2.
required_passives.reason: PLL loop filter. Values from EV kit for 40kHz loop bandwidth at fREF=50MHz, fPFD=25MHz. Adjust with EE-Sim tool for target BW.

application_circuits.name: Typical MAX2870 PLL Frequency Synthesiser (from datasheet p.23)
application_circuits.description: Three separate LDOs supply VCC_RF, VCC_DIG, and VCC_PLL for best performance. All VCC_ pins (CP, PLL, RF, VCO, DIG, SD) decoupled with 100nF + 1µF close to each pin. REF_IN AC-coupled via 100nF to external reference oscillator. CP_OUT drives loop filter (C3=820pF, R3=250Ω, C1=0.012µF, R2A=120Ω, C2=0.1µF) with output going to TUNE. RFOUTA_P/N and RFOUTB_P/N each biased via 27nH choke from VCC_RF, AC-coupled to 50Ω loads. NOISE_FILT, BIAS_FILT, REG each with 1µF cap to GND. RSET with 5.1kΩ to GND. CLK/DATA/LE driven by SPI master. CE and RFOUT_EN pulled high for normal operation. LD and MUX_OUT connected to MCU GPIOs. EP soldered to ground plane with via array.

common_mistakes: GND_CP (8), GND_PLL (9), GND_RF (11), GND_VCO (18), GND_TUNE (21), GND_DIG (27), GND_SD (31) must NOT be routed directly to the exposed paddle (EP) — each pin routes independently to the board ground plane; the ground plane then ties them all and EP together
TUNE (pin 20) must NOT connect directly to CP_OUT (pin 7) — TUNE is the output of the loop filter network that sits between CP_OUT and TUNE
After every power-up or CE de-assertion, registers must be programmed TWICE with a ≥20ms pause: first pass enables the device, second pass starts VCO autoselection
Register programming order is mandatory: 5 → 4 → 3 → 2 → 1 → 0 (repeat both times). Writing out of order causes undefined device state
Keep RFOUT disabled during the init sequence (Reg4 bits 4 and 8 = 0); enable outputs using RFA_EN/RFB_EN only after the second complete programming pass
NOISE_FILT (19), BIAS_FILT (23), and REG (24) MUST each have a 1µF cap to GND — leaving any of them unconnected causes VCO instability and severely degraded phase noise
RF outputs are open-collector — they require a 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF for DC bias. Never connect directly to a supply rail or to GND without a choke
Unused RF outputs must still be terminated: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND. Do not leave floating
REF_IN MUST be AC-coupled — it has an internal DC bias at VCC_DIG/2 that DC-coupled sources will disturb
VCC_VCO decoupling caps must connect to the analog ground plane for best phase noise — using digital ground reduces performance
RSET must have a resistor (2.7kΩ–10kΩ) to GND — do not leave floating or tie directly to GND
For fractional-N mode, set CPL=01 (Reg1 bits 30:29) and CPOC=0 (Reg1 bit31); for integer-N mode, set CPL=00 and CPOC=1 for better in-band phase noise. Swapping these settings degrades performance
Analog lock detect (LD=10 in Reg5) requires an external 10kΩ pull-up to VCC on the LD pin — the output is open-drain in this mode
VCO tune voltage compliance range is 0.5V–2.5V; ADC codes 000 (VTUNE<0.5V) and 111 (VTUNE>2.5V) indicate out-of-lock even if digital LD shows locked
notes: Part number for ordering: MAX2870ETJ+ (TQFN-EP, −40°C to +85°C, RoHS). Register 6 is read-only and accessible via MUX_OUT when MUX[3:0]=1100; contains POR status, VCO autoselect result (V[5:0]), and VTUNE ADC reading (ADC[2:0]). Phase shift mode available after lock: set P to desired increment × M/360, enable with CDM=10, then reset CDM=00. Low-spur modes available via SDN bits (Reg2 bits 30:29): SDN=00 (low-noise), SDN=10 (low-spur mode 1), SDN=11 (low-spur mode 2). VCO manual selection (VAS_SHDN=1) reduces re-lock time by ~200µs by skipping autoselect; requires pre-built VCO lookup table.

passives.description: VCC supply decoupling — one per VCC pin (×6)
VCC bulk decoupling — one per VCC pin (×6)
RSET (pin 22) to GND — sets CP current
RF choke, VCC_RF to each RF output pin (×4)
